creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #4)
> No.  I prefer "and request maintainership" in the title.
> 
> I've changed your titles quite a few times and those changes serve as
> examples.  I assume you got notices showing the title change.  So ideally
> you would notice these changes which show 1) what not to do and 2) what to
> do instead.
> 
> but in this case I explicitly pointed it out.
> 
> 
> 
> "[maintainer]" means the current maintainer opened the PR, not somebody that
> wants to be a maintainer.  It's a way of establishing credibility quickly.

Sorry. I _apparently_ overlooked (missed) the title change.
Point _well_ taken, and acknowledged. :)

--Chris
